title: Núcleo contábil local do Doador em SANDBOX

artifacts.reference: 0017_donor_core; donor_profiles, contributions, allocations, receipts and composition triggers
SANDBOX contribution of 10000 sats separated into 6000 impact and 4000 liquidity

positive_results: DONOR-only HTTP access and participant blocking passed.
Invalid compositions were rejected before persistence.
Repeated idempotency key returned the original contribution and receipt.
Receipt mutation was rejected by PostgreSQL append-only protection.
No Lightning, Fiat, Pix, wallet or exchange-rate provider was contacted.
limitations: Self-verified evidence in a dirty workspace does not satisfy S2 acceptance.
SANDBOX does not prove real donor funding.
Supabase was not migrated or written.
No real donor pubkey or personal data was used.
